runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Other on March 24 over 340m at Hobart behind Ronny Rocket beaten 10 lengths (19.93). Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow out; Bumped and raced wide.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.49) when fifth over 515m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting four places from seven starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
